
```{r}
library(readr)
library(glmnet)
library(grpreg)
library(rsample)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
```

```{r}
fuels_data <- read_csv("fuels_data.csv", col_types = cols(site = col_factor()))
head(fuels_data)
```

```{r}
## training and testing data
set.seed(230)
split_data <- initial_split(fuels_data, prop = 0.75, strata = site)
train_data <- training(split_data)
test_data <- testing(split_data)
```

```{r}
fit_model <- function(train_df, test_df, model_type) {
  
  # create model matrices 
  x_train <- model.matrix(fuel_load_Mg_ha ~ ., data = train_df)[,-1]
  x_test <- model.matrix(fuel_load_Mg_ha ~ ., data = test_df)[,-1]
  
  y_train <- train_df$fuel_load_Mg_ha
  y_test <- test_df$fuel_load_Mg_ha
  
  if(model_type == "ridge") {
    
    # ridge regression with cross-validation 
    cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(x = x_train, y = y_train, alpha = 0, type.measure = "mse", standardize = TRUE)
    
    # test and train set predictions 
    y_hat_train <- as.numeric(predict(cv_fit, newx = x_train, s = "lambda.min"))
    y_hat_test <- as.numeric(predict(cv_fit, newx = x_test, s = "lambda.min"))
    
    # conformal interval
    lambda_min   <- cv_fit$lambda.min
    n_tr         <- nrow(x_train)
    p_tr         <- ncol(x_train)
    X_aug        <- cbind(1, x_train)
    beta_vec     <- as.numeric(coef(cv_fit, s = "lambda.min"))
    Resvec       <- as.numeric(y_train - X_aug %*% beta_vec)
    
    penalty_mat       <- lambda_min * diag(p_tr + 1)
    penalty_mat[1, 1] <- 0
    Gram_inv_aug <- MASS::ginv(t(X_aug) %*% X_aug + penalty_mat)
    H        <- X_aug %*% Gram_inv_aug %*% t(X_aug)
    #leverage <- diag(H)
    resmat   <- diag(n_tr) - H
    
    grid.y <- seq(min(y_train) - 200, max(y_train) + 200, by = 0.1)
    cvr    <- ceiling(0.90 * (n_tr + 1))
    
    loo_pred <- matrix(0, n_tr, 2)
    loo_cov  <- numeric(n_tr)
    
    for (i in seq_len(n_tr)) {
      grid_r <- sapply(grid.y, function(y) {
        Res <- Resvec + resmat[, i] * (y - y_train[i])
        rank(abs(Res))[i]
      })
      valid_y      <- grid.y[grid_r <= cvr]
      Cinterval    <- if (length(valid_y) == 0) c(NA, NA) else range(valid_y)
      loo_pred[i,] <- Cinterval
      loo_cov[i]   <- if (anyNA(Cinterval)) NA else findInterval(y_train[i], Cinterval)
    }
    
    conformal_intervals_df <- data.frame(
      y_true  = y_train,
      lower   = pmax(loo_pred[, 1], 0),   # clip to 0 for plotting
      upper   = loo_pred[, 2],
      width   = loo_pred[, 2] - pmax(loo_pred[, 1], 0),
      covered = loo_cov == 1
    )
    
  } else if (model_type == "lasso") {

    # lasso regression with cross-validation 
    group <- c(rep(1, 5), seq_len(ncol(x_train) - 5) + 1)
    cv_fit <- cv.grpreg(X = x_train, y = y_train, group = group, penalty = "grLasso")
    coefs <- coef(cv_fit, lambda = cv_fit$lambda.min)
    nonzero_coef_names <- setdiff(names(coefs)[coefs != 0], "(Intercept)")

    # test and train set predictions 
    y_hat_train <- as.numeric(predict(cv_fit, X = x_train, lambda = cv_fit$lambda.min))
    y_hat_test <- as.numeric(predict(cv_fit, X = x_test, lambda = cv_fit$lambda.min))
    
    
    # coefficient path plot 
    fit <- cv_fit$fit
    beta_matrix <- as.matrix(coef(fit))
    
    coef_path_df <- as.data.frame(beta_matrix) %>%
      rownames_to_column("term")

    colnames(coef_path_df)[-1] <- fit$lambda
    
    coef_path_df_long <- coef_path_df %>%
      pivot_longer(cols = -term,
                   names_to = "lambda",
                   values_to = "estimate") %>%
      mutate(lambda = as.numeric(lambda)) %>%
      filter(term != "(Intercept)",
             lambda <= 10)
    
    coef_plot <- ggplot(coef_path_df_long, aes(x = lambda, y = estimate, group = term, color = term)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = cv_fit$lambda.min, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(legend.position = "none",
            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
            panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 12)) +
      labs(x = expression(lambda),
           y = "Coefficient") + 
      scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = 0:10)
    
  }
  
  # test-set performance
  rmse <- sqrt(mean((y_test - y_hat_test)^2))
  
  rss <- sum((y_test - y_hat_test)^2)
  tss <- sum((y_test - mean(y_test))^2)
  r2 <- (1-(rss/tss))

  # diagnostic plots
  plot_df <- data.frame(
    y = y_train,
    y_hat = y_hat_train,
    resid = y_train - y_hat_train,
    lower   = conformal_intervals_df$lower,
    upper   = conformal_intervals_df$upper,
    covered = conformal_intervals_df$covered
  )

  resid_plot <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = y_hat, y = resid)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey40", linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 1, se = FALSE, color = "brown3") + 
    labs(x = "Predicted value",
         y = "Residual") +
    theme_minimal() + 
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 12))
  
  fitted_plot <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = y, y = y_hat)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") + 
    labs(x = "Measured surface fuel load (Mg/ha)",
         y = "Predicted surface fuel load (Mg/ha)") +
    theme_minimal() + 
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 12)) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 300)) + 
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 300))
  
  plot_df_sorted <- plot_df[order(plot_df$y), ]
  fitted_plot_intervals <- ggplot(plot_df_sorted, aes(x = y)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                  fill = 'steelblue', alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_point(aes(y = y_hat), alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    labs(x = "Measured surface fuel load (Mg/ha)",
         y = "Predicted surface fuel load (Mg/ha)",
         color = NULL) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
          legend.position = "top") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 300), oob = scales::squish) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 300))
  
  if(model_type == "ridge") {
    
    return(list(
      RMSE = rmse, 
      R2 = r2, 
      residual_plot = resid_plot, 
      fitted_line_plot = fitted_plot, 
      fitted_line_plot_intervals = fitted_plot_intervals, 
      conformal_coverage = mean(loo_cov == 1, na.rm = TRUE), 
      conformal_intervals= conformal_intervals_df
      ))

  } else if (model_type == "lasso") {
    
    return(list(RMSE = rmse, R2 = r2, residual_plot = resid_plot, fitted_line_plot = fitted_plot, 
                coef_path_plot = coef_plot, selected_coefs = nonzero_coef_names))
    
  }
  
}
```

```{r}
ridge <- fit_model(train_df = train_data, test_df = test_data, model_type = "ridge")
ridge$RMSE
ridge$R2

#png(file = "report_figs/ridge_resid.png", width = 7.5*600, height = 5*600, res = 600)
ridge$residual_plot
#dev.off()

#png(file = "report_figs/ridge_fitted_line.png", width = 6*600, height = 4*600, res = 600)
ridge$fitted_line_plot
#dev.off()
```

```{r}
#png(file = "report_figs/ridge_fitted_line_interval.png", width = 6*600, height = 4*600, res = 600)
ridge$fitted_line_plot_intervals
#dev.off()
```

```{r}
lasso <- fit_model(train_df = train_data, test_df = test_data, model_type = "lasso")
lasso$RMSE
lasso$R2
lasso$selected_coefs

#png(file = "report_figs/lasso_resid.png", width = 7.5*600, height = 5*600, res = 600)
lasso$residual_plot
#dev.off()

#png(file = "report_figs/lasso_coefs.png", width = 7.5*600, height = 5*600, res = 600)
lasso$coef_path_plot
#dev.off()
```
